title: Monitoring Triage Report
description: Output of the P-11 monitor-triage skill (plan §6.3/§10 P-11, §11.2). Every monitoring event classified noise/known/new with a required action.

site_slug.description: Optional: set when the report covers a single site rather than the whole fleet.

source.description: Feed that produced the event (plan §11.2: Sentry / Better Stack / lychee / CI-red / GSC).

classification.description: noise = ignorable; known = matches an existing tracked issue; new = requires a new issue (P-11 acceptance criteria).

action.description: What happens next: e.g. 'filed issue #123', 'escalate to sonnet', 'no action (noise)'.
